heading.title: Programs designed around students, families, and communities
heading.description: A clear mix of education, health, nutrition, and empowerment initiatives keeps the trust focused on practical outcomes.

cards.title: Student scholarship support
cards.description: Monthly scholarships, tuition assistance, and learning resources for promising students.

cards.title: Free community health camps
cards.description: Doctor consultations, basic screening, and awareness sessions delivered in high-need areas.

cards.title: Food and ration drives
cards.description: Targeted relief support for families during seasonal hardship and emergency situations.

cards.title: Skill and livelihood programs
cards.description: Training sessions that help young people and caregivers move toward stable income opportunities.

cards.title: After-school learning center
cards.description: Homework support, reading sessions, and digital literacy guidance for school-aged children.

cards.title: Wellness awareness campaigns
cards.description: Trusted information sessions on hygiene, nutrition, preventive care, and mental wellbeing.
